content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (C:11):

From the image, atom C:11 is connected to:
- Atom C:10 (carbon) - directly bonded
- Atom C:12 (carbon) - directly bonded  
- Atom H:14 (hydrogen) - directly bonded

These three atoms are covalently connected to atom C:11.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 6302, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_6302.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 11 (C) are:
- Atomic index 10, element C
- Atomic index 12, element C  
- Atomic index 14, element H

Geomconf_index: 6302

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
